title: e2e: fix pprof flakes
body:
Give the services some more time after SIGINT to shutdown.
`Eventually(session, 5)` will poll the session for the specific
condition at a frequency of 10ms for at most 5 seconds.

Fixes: #12167
Signed-off-by: Valentin Rothberg <rothberg@redhat.com>

Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@edsantiago, I am positive that will cure the flake but I am never fully satisfied with bumping timeouts.  At least the polling will avoid waiting entire 5 seconds.
I should mention that eventually waits 1 second by default.
I know: this [gomega ref](https://onsi.github.io/gomega/) has been stickied in my browser for the last two weeks (due to all my e2e test work), and I checked it before commenting!
